detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Private_accumulation_fund.CashOut(uint256) (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#55-81):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#69)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#73)
	Private_accumulation_fund.balances (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Private_accumulation_fund.CashOut(uint256) (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#55-81)
	- Private_accumulation_fund.Deposit() (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#33-51)
	- Private_accumulation_fund.balances (Private_accumulation_fund.sol#9)
